title: Diego's Animal Friends Feel Happy
synopsis: Diego discovers different animals and learns about happy feelings through gentle sounds and movements. Each animal friend shows Diego how they express joy, from barking puppies to chirping birds, creating a warm exploration of emotions and animal sounds.

pages.text: Diego sees a puppy. Woof, woof! Happy puppy!

illustration.description: A smiling toddler boy Diego with warm brown skin, dark curly hair, and bright eyes wearing a soft yellow shirt sits on green grass. A golden retriever puppy with a wagging tail faces him, mouth open in a happy pant. Soft pastel yellow and green watercolor background with dappled sunlight.
illustration.alt: Diego sitting with a happy golden puppy in sunny grass

pages.text: Diego sees a kitty. Purr, purr! Happy kitty!

illustration.description: Diego reaches out his small hand toward a fluffy orange tabby cat that is arching its back contentedly. The cat's green eyes are half-closed in bliss, tail curved upward. Warm orange and cream watercolor tones create a cozy indoor setting with soft shadows.
illustration.alt: Diego petting a purring orange cat

pages.text: Diego sees a birdie. Tweet, tweet! Happy birdie!

illustration.description: Diego looks up with wonder at a bright blue robin perched on a low tree branch above him. The bird has its beak open mid-song, wings slightly spread. Soft blue sky background with delicate green leaves framing the scene in gentle watercolor strokes.
illustration.alt: Diego looking up at a singing blue bird in a tree

pages.text: Diego sees a bunny. Hop, hop! Happy bunny!

illustration.description: A white rabbit with pink inner ears is mid-hop near Diego, who claps his hands in delight. The bunny's fluffy tail is visible as it bounces. Soft lavender and white watercolor background suggests a garden setting with gentle purple flowers scattered around.
illustration.alt: Diego clapping as a white bunny hops nearby

pages.text: Diego sees a duckie. Quack, quack! Happy duckie!

illustration.description: Diego sits by a small pond edge watching a yellow duckling paddle in calm blue water. Gentle ripples surround the duckling whose orange beak is open in a quack. Soft blue and yellow watercolor tones reflect in the water with cattails in the background.
illustration.alt: Diego watching a yellow duckling in a pond

pages.text: Diego sees a lamb. Baa, baa! Happy lamb!

illustration.description: A fluffy white lamb with a pink nose stands next to Diego in a meadow. Diego has his arms open wide, smiling broadly. The lamb appears to be bleating with joy. Soft green grass and wildflowers in pastel pink and purple create a dreamy watercolor meadow scene.
illustration.alt: Diego with arms open next to a white lamb in a flower meadow

pages.text: Diego sees a piggy. Oink, oink! Happy piggy!

illustration.description: A small pink pig with a curly tail waddles toward Diego, who is giggling with his hands on his cheeks. The pig's snout is upturned in what appears to be a smile. Warm pink and peach watercolor background with soft brown earth tones suggests a cozy farm setting.
illustration.alt: Diego giggling at a happy pink pig

pages.text: All the animals love Diego. Diego feels happy too!

illustration.description: Diego sits in the center surrounded by all the animals - the puppy, cat, bird, bunny, duck, lamb, and pig - all gathered around him in a circle. Diego's face beams with pure joy, arms outstretched. Rainbow of soft pastel colors creates a magical, warm atmosphere in gentle watercolor style.
illustration.alt: Diego surrounded by all his happy animal friends

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What sound does the puppy make?
questions.explanation: Puppies say 'Woof, woof!' when they're happy!

questions.question: How does Diego feel with his animal friends?
questions.explanation: Diego feels happy when he's with all his animal friends!

questions.question: What does the duckie say?
questions.explanation: Duckies say 'Quack, quack!' when they swim!

pages.text: Diego sees a puppy. ____, ____! Happy puppy!
Diego sees a kitty. ____, ____! Happy kitty!
